title: codereview-pass3: Forward reference and meta content
description: spec/02a-coordinated-capacity.md:42 references non-existent 'Section 2a.5', and line 48 has meta 'aligns with parent epic' which violates 'No dead code in spec'. Remove meta, add stub or defer section. Use strict RFC2119 only. P3. After 3 passes, converge on clean.
